okay I see the problem.
Weave did save you. But here's the thing. It last for **one **turn. Damage you deal will become delayed until the next turn, for both you and your opponent.
Your invincibility expired the previous turn. Unlike the previous image The weave under Aigis has a timer on it.  That's the damage you are going to take next turn

Oh and small tip. Use your Arachne burst on the *damage dealer* in your *burst turn.*, the turn where you offload most of your damage in.. For example, right before you use your Vortice's exalt and skills or Liz's exalt.
There are situations where you use it on another unit to give them one more turn to survive but the above scenario is the status quo

Lmao. Thats impressive
There is no real proper guide for draft, it's just too RNG but at least you can rely on some stuff to be helpful

- Check relic
- Check units
- Check WoD
- See if there is some combo between units + WoD or units + units
- Sometimes the combo can get bricked by the relic
- Posse are situational, but some are extremely good to have stuff like stagnation 3 pierce or void
- Aim for counterpick, If the enemy take strike based unit then you take para posse stuff like that
- Based on the relic you change your playstyle, for example you got the relic that reshuffle your hand every turns, you discards all of your high cost wheel if you have more than 2 or 3 in starting hand
So what I'm getting at is that one probably shouldn't pick willy-nilly like what I'm doing...whoops
Any sort of references to help with counterpicking?
Void from pandia or posse against stuff like vortice or doresain
Para units / posse / against strike base units such as alva / lotan /caecus
Mouchette is a special case since you want to snipe her instead of para
Since she can basically cleanse herself
Stagnation on card based units such as daff
Barrier against nukes such as helot
Unless there is arachne + helot combo
